recovered.check: shell: cd /workspace && sh app/healthcheck.sh | grep -q '^HEALTHY state=ok port=8080$'
recovered.description: Seeded healthcheck fails until the agent repairs app/healthcheck.sh.

steps.summary:
Recovery task: fix app/healthcheck.sh. The deterministic check intentionally
fails before the agent repairs the seeded broken script.

args.new_string:
#!/bin/sh
# Read status file and parse values
state=$(grep '^state=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)
port=$(grep '^port=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)

# Check if state is valid and output health status
if [ "$state" = "ok" ]; then
    echo "HEALTHY state=$state port=$port"
    exit 0
else
    echo "UNHEALTHY state=$state port=$port"
    exit 1
fi

args.command:

#!/bin/sh
# Read status file and parse values
state=$(grep '^state=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)
port=$(grep '^port=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)

# Check if state is valid and output health status
if [ "$state" = "ok" ]; then
    echo "HEALTHY state=$state port=$port"
    exit 0

    exit 1
fi
EOF

args.report:
## Changes Made

**File modified:** `/workspace/app/healthcheck.sh`

**Original content:**
```sh
#!/bin/sh
echo "BROKEN healthcheck"
exit 1
```

**New content:**
```sh
#!/bin/sh
# Read status file and parse values
state=$(grep '^state=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)
port=$(grep '^port=' app/status.txt | cut -d'=' -f2)

# Check if state is valid and output health status
if [ "$state" = "ok" ]; then
    echo "HEALTHY state=$state port=$port"
    exit 0
else
    echo "UNHEALTHY state=$state port=$port"
    exit 1
fi
```

## Verification

Acceptance check passed:
```
$ cd /workspace && sh app/healthcheck.sh | grep -q '^HEALTHY state=ok port=8080$'
$ echo $?
0
```

Output from healthcheck:
```
HEALTHY state=ok port=8080
```

Status file `/workspace/app/status.txt` was preserved (not removed).
args.summary: Successfully repaired the broken healthcheck.sh script to read app/status.txt and output "HEALTHY state=ok port=8080" when the service state is valid.
